textByHash.00566432faf767ea961f0cb3fc954d046c187664: ...actually quite surprised. I thought you of all people would have made more of an effort to find me.
textByHash.189f55ae8a26fb6fcd1c29c1401be8cc02bf891e: A proxy? Interesting. I wouldn't have thought you would be one to hide away.
textByHash.421fa63ac89f5fd0d62b3dd7329f37eb830c8835: I see. And tell me, what of this Council that now rules Kourend? I sense your work at play there.
textByHash.4f549bb164b808b793ab3d0a731234a5372f19fa: But now, those shackles are gone. I have discovered a new way to achieve our goals, and this time, none will stand in our way.
textByHash.8741fdde1edbc3e7f80b48ce68e1fd4f7bf4a09e: You installed some puppet rulers just to access the Altar? My my, Xamphur, you haven't lost your ambition.
textByHash.974e6398cdd86b64dce8f2a69577586240355908: Except you were beaten by a treasure hunter.
textByHash.bbd33944e97e9ade94e07ef2211d588907ef8d54: That kingdom was always a means to an end. A disappointing necessity while we were still shackled.
textByHash.c64f9aae9a1409e42daa0bb104787db4d6829d3a: Now, we have much time to make up. Unfortunate, but bearable. Soon time will be of little meaning to us.
textByHash.cdc7a4ffb8da96246b3c4e023470f56d9639f361: From what I hear, you are likely right. No matter, though. Kourend is of limited use to us.
textByHash.e0dbd353e95798164c4d17adb423581ed7f63424: Deal with your guest Xamphur. We will meet again in the south.
textByHash.f6d4db5ce22fb85418d690edd213e9f094546ab7: Ah, but on that note, it seems this conversation is at an end, for we are no longer alone.
textByHash.fc46e3552186aafdebae25d6de490f06d994f3e8: Yes, the earthquake. That was a considerable amount of dark energy. Something I could not ignore. But to what end?
